text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: December has come...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the holidays are twenty-five days away.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer. There is something I wish for you to see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She excitedly holds a thin, flat box out to me.
There's a festive scene on its lid.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A countdown calendar. Have you heard of them
before?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
December is an important month for a lot of
people in Germany, with all sorts of festivities
going on. Counting down the days is one of them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The small doors are each labeled with a date, and
one is to be opened each day until the big
celebration at the end of the month.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As for the contents... Please open today's door
and see for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she asks and pull open the flap, revealing
a small golden parcel inside it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That has chocolate in it. There are twenty-five
days' worth of confectionaries within this
calendar.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Impressive, I know. Getting to see what is inside
each day is quite thrilling.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would be most happy if this countdown calendar
gave you something small to look forward to
every day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We can't. There are not enough sweets for both
of us. I made this specifically for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates and sweets inside, yes. Each one
is unique.
choice_data_list: You put so much work into this...
You put so much work into this...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That's because it's a special time of year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Though that is not the only reason.
choice_data_list: Let me help you with something too.
Let me help you with something too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, it's all right. My holiday plan was set in
motion three months ago, so there's no need to
assist me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will prepare food and cake as well. I hope you
look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know she said I didn't need to help, but I still
feel bad for not doing anything in return. I should
get her a present, at the very least.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I received the same wreath. The message affixed
to it was different, however.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"May the joy you felt at your debut continue
throughout your racing career." That is the wish
mine is imbued with.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are twenty-five days until the big
celebration. I take out my phone to search for
craft classes I can attend between shifts at work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash keeps working diligently throughout
the month as the big day draws nearer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Time to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash drags in a massive tree that's easily
over two meters tall like it's a toothpick.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was able to acquire a Nordmann fir, which I
intend to start decorating immediately.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It will be a grand centerpiece by the twenty-fifth,
so please look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer. Have you opened today's countdown
calendar door?
choice_data_list: Yes, I got some gummy candies!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In the shape of teddy bears, yes? I had a lot of
fun preparing them as chances to make gummy
candy are few and far between.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Now you must excuse me. I still have work to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On another day...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A five-kilogram goose, please. I will pick it up on
the day of.

text_block_list.name: Butcher
text_block_list.text: You got it! I'll get the best one I can just for you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Next is the supermarket. I need four kilograms of
potatoes, four heads of purple cabbage, two
kilograms of apples...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I watch over her as she balances holiday
preparations and her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
December is drawing to an end. Eishin Flash and I
open the last door on the countdown calendar
together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's delicious and sweet since it's
made of marzipan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
With that, all the doors have been opened. Well
done.
choice_data_list: Thanks! That was a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad. I also enjoyed your report each morning
before our training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Now, regarding our schedule for the party...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We will chat about it while partaking in a meal.
That is all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised by the schedule's sparse details,
especially knowing how hard she worked to get
everything ready.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that is all. I only prepared food and
decorations.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'll bring the food over now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Is this... a wreath?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Eishin Flash the wreath I've painstakingly
put together over the past month.
choice_data_list:
It's not much compared to the one from your
parents, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, did you make this by hand?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Just for me?
choice_data_list:
Yep. I made it in hopes that you'll always be
happy, Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
May you always find happiness wherever life
takes you...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Apologies. I-I'm just so overwhelmed with joy...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This holiday is meant to be spent with family and
holds a special place in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, I did not have the mental leeway to
celebrate properly last year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And... I didn't believe I had anyone to celebrate it
with.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be better to forgo it if thinking
about my family was only going to make me feel
lonely...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But in reality, there was someone watching over
me like family the entire time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's why I put on a party this year. I wanted to
celebrate properly and use it to thank that
special person.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And yet, I'm the one who received a wonderful
present in the process.
choice_data_list: You've given me so much more.
You've given me so much more.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: No, it is you who—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. There will be no end at this rate. The dishes
are getting cold, so why don't we begin the
party?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What would you like first? There is carp too, if
you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I anticipated that reaction. This is called "Karpfen
blau," and it is a lovely seasonal dish.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems carp is not a common ingredient in
Japan. Falcon was most surprised when I...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was quite innocent and believed Santa Claus
existed beyond a shadow of a doubt.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I made a plan to capture him and set it into
motion... But all I ended up doing was catching
my parents completely off guard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash tells me even more stories while I
enjoy her cooking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing how much Eishin Flash loves the
festive season, I wanted to find another way to
make it even more special for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, while we're enjoying the food and
chatting together...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hello, hellooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hi, you two! Happy Holidays! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon? What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's not just me! C'mon in, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Happy Holidays, Flash! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Happy Holidays! Wow, look at all this food! I've
gotta take a pic of this!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Curren, Jordan. And everyone else... I wasn't
expecting you all.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, just to be clear, we're not here to crash your
quiet party or anything.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Buuut! We do want you to experience the loud
and rowdy end-of-year parties we like to hold in
Japan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash might have thought she didn't have
anyone to spend the holidays with last year, but
that belief of hers isn't true anymore.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You're right... It seems I do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I'm here at this academy right now,
spending the holidays with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks just like a child with her bright,
beaming smile.
